nasb.text: Now the Canaanite, the king of Arad who lived in the Negev in the land of Canaan, heard of the coming of the sons of Israel.

esv.text: And the Canaanite, the king of Arad, who lived in the Negeb in the land of Canaan, heard of the coming of the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 那時，住在迦南地南方的迦南人亞拉得王，聽說以色列人來了。

ccb.text: 在南地的迦南人亚拉得王得知了以色列人要来的消息。
